description_long: This object consists of two weathered stone grave markers set on a rectangular patch of green grass and earth. The larger headstone on the left is rectangular with a slightly slanted top and shows significant signs of aging, including discoloration and surface erosion. The smaller headstone on the right features a rounded, ornate top with visible carvings and relief details, though the inscriptions are mostly illegible due to wear. Both stones are embedded in the ground, surrounded by a border of vibrant green moss or grass, suggesting an outdoor cemetery setting. The surfaces of the stones are rough and pitted, with visible lichen or moss growth in some areas. The overall appearance is somber and historic, evoking a sense of age and reverence.
description: Two weathered stone grave markers, one large and rectangular, the other smaller with an ornate top, set on a grassy patch with visible signs of age and erosion.
description_view_0: Front view showing both grave markers side by side, highlighting the larger rectangular stone and the smaller ornate headstone with visible carvings.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of both headstones and their close proximity, with the grassy base visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of both grave markers, with the larger stone's inscription faintly visible and the ornate top of the smaller stone apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth and alignment of the stones, with the grassy base running along the length.
